  ⏵⏵ auto mode on (shift+tab to cycle) · esc to interrupt
  ⎿  Bash(some earlier tool call result)

● Some older output line

╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│   You've hit your limit · resets 2am (Europe/London)                 │
│   /extra-usage to finish what you're working on.                     │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

>
